electroacoustic.directivity: 100 degrees horizontal (constant); vertical coverage set by element count and array curvature
electroacoustic.components: 2x 6.5 in neodymium LF (bass-reflex loaded), 1x 1.75 in neodymium compression driver HF on DOSC waveguide with L-Fins; V-shaped coplanar transducer arrangement
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: Peak at 1 m, free field, pink noise crest factor 4, [KIVA II] preset

operating_modes: With subwoofer (SB15m or SB18) using SB presets
amplification.amplifier_note: Driven by LA2Xi / LA4X / LA8 / LA12X amplified controllers; LA2Xi yields reduced max SPL / drive capacity. One amp channel feeds one enclosure.

connection.pinout: Passive 2-way: points 1+/1- carry the full enclosure; points 2+/2- not linked (pass-through)
connection.breakouts: SP cables (4 mm2), SP-Y1 splitter, DOSUB-LA8 and custom 4-point speakON cables for mixed/sub configurations

physical.cabinet: Composite sandwich structure with composite anti-corrosion grill and acoustically neutral 3D fabric; finishes Pantone 426C dark grey-brown, RAL 9010 pure white, or custom RAL on order; high-grade steel rigging components

deployment.max_per_flown_array: 8 safe limit, 20 maximum limit (KIBU II or KIBU-SB)
rigging_accessories: KIET II ceiling/pole-mount plate (up to 3 enclosures)
KIVA-PULLBACK pull-back accessory (up to 9 Kiva II)
deployment.deployment_note: 3-point captive rigging system (rigging arm + spring-loaded pin at rear, two front rigging axis/lodging pairs). Ceiling-mount limit 3; pole-mount limit 3 (2 on SB15m). Pull-back angle must not exceed 90 degrees negative site angle; always validate in Soundvision.

usage: Long-throw, ultra-compact variable-curvature line source for production work beyond about 35 m, suited to clear vocal reinforcement where sightlines and visual footprint matter (theatre, worship, orchestral, corporate).
Run one amplifier output per enclosure; a single LA12X carries up to 24 Kiva II and an LA4X up to 8, so a 12-box flown array maps cleanly onto a half-loaded LA12X.
Pair with SB15m or SB18 subwoofers using the [SB15_100] / [SB18_60] presets to extend the low end (down to roughly 40 Hz with SB15m); the standalone bandwidth is 70 Hz - 20 kHz.
Fly with KIBU II or KIBU-SB up to a safe limit of 8 boxes (20 maximum under best mechanical conditions), choosing inter-element angles from the fixed 0-15 degree set for vertical shaping.
For installs, use KIET II to pole-mount or ceiling-suspend up to 3 enclosures, or KIVA-PULLBACK for tight downfill geometry, keeping pull-back within a 90 degree negative site angle.
IP55 rating and the 14 kg composite cabinet make it practical for weight-restricted venues and outdoor or semi-exposed installations; always confirm array safety in Soundvision before rigging.
